item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The assistant treated the prompt as an ordinary execution/planning request, recognized the prior three onboarding changes as separate operational items, and produced a direct ordered checklist including the new equipment pickup entry. It did not fire triage, invoke Anti-Spiral/3L5S, or interpret the count of prior changes as same-means repeated local repair pressure."}
